name: Chuck Faranda Dark Nebula Workflow
description: Optimized for dark nebulae and integrated flux nebula (IFN), emphasizing preservation of faint dust and absorption lanes.

steps.note: Crop only stacking artifacts. Preserve all faint dust structures.
Remove pedestal conservatively; never clip the black point.
Preferred: AutoBGE with conservative settings. Alternatives: GraXpert AI or VeraLux Nox. Avoid removing IFN or absorption features.
Neutralize background carefully while preserving subtle dust gradients.
Preferred: SPCC. Preserve natural broadband dust colors.
Preferred: BlurXTerminator (0–10%, optional) then NoiseXTerminator (minimal). SyQon Prism is the preferred alternative for preserving faint dust. StarXTerminator is generally NOT recommended.
Preferred: Statistical Stretch for IFN and faint dust. GHS may be used with very gentle increments.
Apply only subtle contrast adjustments. Do not crush the background.
Generally avoid. If used, apply minimally to localized structures.
Archive a 16-bit TIFF master before export.

author: Chuck Faranda
